heading: Omitted
label: 1129 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to tax exemption of funds distributed under the provisions of former sections 1122 to 1130 of this title, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–309, § 886 Stat. 200June 2, 1972
